issues.title: Ford wanted its people back
issues.dek: Ford replaced veteran engineers with AI, watched quality slide, and quietly rehired 350 of them. Plus: the man who taught 20 million people to organise their AI folders just told everyone to bin the folders.

issues.title: Stop typing, start talking

issues.title: Agency beats knowledge every time
